name: UbuntuDryRunEvidencePacket
description: Recorded proof and review decisions for Ubuntu dry-run categories.

dry_run_category.description: The category of the dry-run (e.g. export_restore, provider_adapter, browser_handoff, local_audit_logging, emergency_halt, rollback_reversal, parallel_validation, host_attestation).

title.description: Short descriptive title for this evidence packet.

status.description: Current status: pending_review, passed, failed, needs_more_evidence, blocked, superseded.

reviewed_by_email.description: Email of the admin who reviewed this packet.

reviewed_at_label.description: Timestamp label of the last review.

evidence_summary.description: Summary of the proof provided (e.g. 'Verified local log file checksums').

proof_location_label.description: Reference to where the proof is stored (e.g. 'Local runner /logs/halt-test-01.log').

risk_level.description: Risk level associated with this category: LOW, MEDIUM, HIGH, CRITICAL.

blocker_summary.description: Summary of what is blocking this category if failed or blocked.

decision_notes.description: Detailed notes on the review decision.

no_secret_confirmation.description: Confirmation that no secrets or exported data are included in this record.

host_attestation_related.description: Whether this evidence is specifically related to host hardware attestation.

activation_gate_impact.description: Impact on activation: blocks_activation, supports_activation, informational.

metadata.description: Additional metadata for the evidence packet.
